creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Martin Filla from comment #5)


Dec 20 13:43:21 hades2 wpa_supplicant[344]: wlan0: No network configuration found for the current AP

Are you sure the ssid is wpa_supplicant.conf is correct and you reloaded the config file (or restarted the supplicant) after you put it in?

Make sure there are no wide characters there by accident from pasting on a terminal which may not be immediately visible.

I'd probably also add a
proto=WPA2
line or maybe just try with a file like this:

=====
ctrl_interface=/var/run/wpa_supplicant

network={
        ssid="WIFI-ASUS"
        proto=WPA2
        psk="enter psk here"
}
=====

and see what happens.
